message:
🌱 Add prometheus: Migrate Prometheus APIs to OpenAPI/Swagger mission (#1693)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "prometheus-2392-migrate-prometheus-apis-to-openapi-swagger",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "prometheus: Migrate Prometheus APIs to OpenAPI/Swagger",
+    "description": "Migrate Prometheus APIs to OpenAPI/Swagger. Requested by 10+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current prometheus deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your prometheus version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus\nhelm list -n prometheus 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working prometheus installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review prometheus configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant prometheus configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus\nkubectl get configmap -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=prometheus\n```\nIMO prometheus should have live/interactive swagger doc for the API ala: http://petstore.swagger.io"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Migrate Prometheus APIs to OpenAPI/Swagger",
+        "description": "Hello, thanks for your work.\n\nunfortunately that is a lot of details and I do not think this is how we should proceed. There are a *lot* of subtle things in openapi and I do not believe that crafting openapi \"out of the blue\" can give a fully correct result.\n\nThe objective here is to have openapi\n```yaml\nHow it looks like for OpenAPI-generated schema:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus\nkubectl get events -n prometheus --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Migrate Prometheus APIs to OpenAPI/Swagger\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Hello, thanks for your work.\n\nunfortunately that is a lot of details and I do not think this is how we should proceed. There are a *lot* of subtle things in openapi and I do not believe that crafting openapi \"out of the blue\" can give a fully correct result.\n\nThe objective here is to have openapi generating go code somehow, and then use that generated code to implement the actual API.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "How it looks like for OpenAPI-generated schema:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {

+      "prometheus",

+    },

+  },
